intro.en: Shanda AI Research Tokyo is the Tokyo-based research arm of the Shanda Group, dedicated to pushing the boundaries of speech and audio intelligence. We are building the voice layer for the next era of human-AI interaction — from expressive game characters to empathetic digital companions.
intro.zh: 盛大 AI 东京研究院是盛大集团旗下设立在东京的研究机构，致力于推动语音与音频智能的前沿探索。我们正在为人机交互的下一个时代构建「声音层」—— 从富有表现力的游戏角色到具有共情能力的数字人。

body.en: The speech AI landscape is undergoing a paradigm shift. Large language models are gaining the ability to listen and speak; discrete speech tokens are replacing handcrafted acoustic features; and real-time, emotion-aware synthesis is becoming table stakes for next-generation applications. We believe the next breakthrough in human-AI interaction will be defined by voice — not just what AI says, but how it says it. The roles below put you at the center of that transformation.
body.zh: 语音 AI 正经历范式级变革：大语言模型开始具备听说能力，离散语音 Token 正在取代手工声学特征，实时情感合成正成为下一代应用的基础能力。我们相信，人机交互的下一次飞跃将由「声音」定义 —— 不仅是 AI 说什么，更是它怎么说。以下岗位都将让你站在这场变革的最前沿。

items.en: A focused, research-first team where your ideas ship to production and reach real users
items.zh: 一支专注、研究优先的团队 —— 你的想法将落地产品并触达真实用户

items.en: Dedicated GPU cluster for large-scale experiments — no fighting for compute
items.zh: 专用 GPU 集群支持大规模实验 —— 无需排队抢算力

items.en: Freedom to publish and engage with the open research community
items.zh: 自由发表论文并参与开放学术社区

items.en: Competitive compensation and visa sponsorship for international candidates
items.zh: 有竞争力的薪酬及海外候选人签证支持

title.zh: 高级研究科学家 / 研究工程师

roles.applySubject: Applying for Senior Research Scientist / Research Engineer

items.en: End-to-end speech model R&D: Design, implement, and iterate on state-of-the-art ASR, TTS, neural vocoders, and audio codec models. Own the full research-to-production pipeline — from architecture design and distributed training to deployment-ready inference optimization.
items.zh: 端到端语音模型研发：设计、实现并持续迭代最先进的 ASR/TTS、神经声码器和音频编码模型。全权负责从架构设计、分布式训练到部署级推理优化的完整流程。

items.en: Emotion-aware & style-controllable synthesis: Build speech synthesis systems with nuanced emotion expression and fine-grained style control. Develop emotion/paralinguistic annotation pipelines and leverage post-training strategies (reward modeling, GRPO) to achieve natural, human-like expressiveness.
items.zh: 情感感知与风格可控合成：构建具备细腻情感表达和精细风格控制的语音合成系统。开发情感/副语言标注流水线，结合后训练策略（奖励建模、GRPO）实现自然拟人的表现力。

items.en: Speech tokenization & speech LLMs: Explore discrete speech representations, speech-text multimodal modeling, and the integration of speech capabilities into LLMs. Investigate masked diffusion, flow matching, and autoregressive token prediction for next-generation audio generation.
items.zh: 语音 Token 化与 Speech LLM：探索离散语音表示、语音-文本多模态建模，以及将语音能力整合进 LLM 的路径。研究掩码扩散、Flow Matching、自回归 Token 预测等新兴范式。

items.en: Multimodal audio-visual modeling: Extend speech AI into the audio-visual domain — talking-head generation, lip-sync avatars, and interactive digital humans that bridge voice synthesis with visual generation.
items.zh: 多模态音视频建模：将语音 AI 拓展至音视频领域 —— 说话人头像生成、唇形同步数字人和交互式虚拟人，打通语音合成与视觉生成。

items.en: Academic impact: Publish at top-tier venues (Interspeech, ICASSP, ACL, NeurIPS, ICLR). Contribute arXiv preprints, release open-source models, and engage with the broader research community.
items.zh: 学术影响力：在顶级会议（Interspeech、ICASSP、ACL、NeurIPS、ICLR）发表成果，发布 arXiv 预印本与开源模型，积极参与学术社区交流。

items.en: Education: Master’s or Ph.D. in speech processing, EE, CS, ML, or a related field. We value demonstrated research ability over specific credentials; exceptional candidates with strong publications or industry track records are welcome.
items.zh: 学历：语音处理、电子工程、计算机科学、机器学习或相关领域的硕士/博士。相比学历本身，我们更看重已被验证的研究能力；具备优秀论文或工业经历的候选人同样欢迎。

items.en: Core expertise: Solid hands-on experience in TTS, ASR, voice conversion, neural vocoding, or audio generation. Familiarity with modern architectures (Transformers, diffusion models, flow matching, codec-based systems) is strongly preferred.
items.zh: 核心能力：在 TTS、ASR、语音转换、神经声码器或音频生成方面有扎实实践经验。熟悉现代架构（Transformer、扩散模型、Flow Matching、Codec 系统）者优先。

items.en: Engineering: Proficient in PyTorch (and/or JAX). Able to implement papers from scratch, debug complex training pipelines, and write clean experiment code. Experience with DeepSpeed/FSDP and CUDA optimization is a strong plus.
items.zh: 工程能力：精通 PyTorch（和/或 JAX），能从零实现论文并调试复杂训练流水线。有 DeepSpeed/FSDP 及 CUDA 优化经验者优先。

items.en: Scale: Experience training models on large-scale audio datasets (tens of thousands of hours). Comfortable with the full data lifecycle — collection, cleaning, annotation, and quality-aware training.
items.zh: 规模化经验：有万小时级别音频数据训练经验，熟悉数据收集、清洗、标注到训练的完整流程。

body.en: As a research intern, you will work directly on frontier research topics with high publication potential. This is not a support role — you will lead independent research threads, run experiments on our dedicated GPU cluster, and target first-author or co-author publications at top conferences. You will receive close mentorship from experienced researchers while having the freedom to explore bold ideas.
body.zh: 作为研究实习生，你将直接参与具有高发表潜力的前沿课题。这不是辅助性岗位 —— 你将独立推进研究线程、在专用 GPU 集群上跑实验，并以顶会一作/共同作者论文为目标。你将获得资深研究员的密切指导，同时拥有探索大胆想法的空间。

intro.en: You will focus on one or more of the following, depending on your interests and background:
intro.zh: 你将根据兴趣和背景，聚焦以下方向中的一个或多个：

items.en: Speech LLMs & discrete audio modeling — integrating speech understanding and generation into LLMs via speech tokenization, masked diffusion, or autoregressive token prediction
items.zh: Speech LLM 与离散音频建模 —— 通过语音 Token 化、掩码扩散或自回归预测，将语音理解与生成能力整合进大语言模型

items.en: Emotion-aware & controllable synthesis — reward modeling, GRPO-based post-training, and large-scale paralinguistic annotation for expressive TTS
items.zh: 情感感知与可控合成 —— 奖励建模、GRPO 后训练、大规模副语言标注，实现富有表现力的 TTS

items.en: Multimodal audio-visual generation — talking-head synthesis, lip-sync avatars, and interactive digital humans
items.zh: 多模态音视频生成 —— 说话人头像合成、唇形同步、交互式数字人

items.en: Speech evaluation & benchmarking — robust metrics and evaluation frameworks for long-form, emotion-rich speech generation
items.zh: 语音评测与基准构建 —— 为长篇、情感丰富的语音生成开发稳健的评价指标与评测框架

items.en: Currently pursuing (or recently completed) a Master’s or Ph.D. in speech processing, CS, EE, ML, or a related field
items.zh: 正在攻读（或近期完成）语音处理、计算机科学、电子工程、机器学习或相关领域的硕士/博士学位

items.en: Solid deep learning foundation with hands-on PyTorch experience (required)
items.zh: 深度学习基础扎实，具备 PyTorch 实践经验（必需）

items.en: Familiarity with speech/audio models (TTS, ASR, vocoders, codecs) or generative models (diffusion, flow matching, autoregressive LMs)
items.zh: 熟悉语音/音频模型（TTS、ASR、声码器、Codec）或生成模型（扩散、Flow Matching、自回归 LM）

items.en: Self-driven, comfortable reading and reproducing research papers independently
items.zh: 自驱力强，能独立阅读和复现论文
